assignments.description: Stores the records type to the Opportunity Variable also includes Account ID
assignments.name: Opportunity_Values_Assignment
assignments.label: Opportunity Values Assignment

decisions.description: Is the currency needed on the deal GBP or EUR
decisions.name: Currency_EUR_or_GBP
decisions.label: Currency EUR or GBP

Flow.description: Create an AA opportunity for any sector without adding products
Flow.interviewLabel: Opportunity Creation Screen Flow - Without Products {!$Flow.CurrentDateTime}
Flow.label: Opportunity Creation Screen Flow - Without Products

screens.name: Choose_your_Opportunity_type
screens.label: Choose your Opportunity type
screens.helpText:
Please ensure you select the Record Type.


  • For Business Services please use Standard
  • For Drivetech please select Drivetech

visibilityRule.conditionLogic: 1 AND (2 OR 3 OR 4 OR 5 OR 6 OR 7)

fields.name: Holding
fields.helpText: Enter the Holdings number available at the time this opportunity is created.

fields.name: Number_of_Drivers
fields.helpText: Enter the number of drivers that this opportunity is for.

fields.name: No_of_E_Scooter_E_Bikes
fields.fieldText: No of E Scooter & E Bikes

fields.name: Total_Fleet_Size
fields.helpText: Enter the fleet size that is applicable for this opportunity (it may be different to the Account 'Total Fleet Size').

fields.name: Total_SMR_jobs_per_year
fields.helpText: Enter the SMR jobs that this opportunity relates to (This can be different to the total Account volume).

fields.name: Total_Fleet_Size_AAX
fields.helpText: Enter the fleet size that is applicable for this opportunity (it may be different to the Account 'Total Fleet Size')

variables.description: Used for when opp is created from Account record to pass the Account into the field automatically
variables.name: recordId

variables.description: Stores data needed for creation of OppLine Item
variables.name: VarOppLineItem

variables.description: Collects the data to turn the pricebook entries into Opp Line items
variables.name: VarOppProd

variables.description: Variable to store the fields for the opportunity
variables.name: VarOppRecord
